info.name: Wasel Palestine Backend API
info.description:
Full API-Dog collection aligned with implemented FastAPI routes for the Wasel Palestine backend.

## Authentication
This API uses JWT Bearer authentication.
1. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.
2. Save `access_token` and `refresh_token`.
3. Send `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` for protected endpoints.
4. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` when access token expires.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:8000`

## Success Response Shape
```json
{
  "data": {},
  "meta": {
    "request_id": null,
    "timestamp": "2026-04-13T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

## Error Response Shape
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
    "message": "Invalid request payload",
    "details": []
  }
}
```

variable.description: JWT access token set from login response
JWT refresh token set from login response
